title: Floral Bouncy-QQ British Dumplings Trifle
description: A quick-fix dessert featuring floral-flavored dumplings in a low-carb-friendly trifle form baked in a cataplana vessel.
instructions: Combine the Floral Flavoring Mix and a pinch of salt with the Vegetable Stock Cube in a bowl.
Stir until dissolved, then set aside to cool slightly.
Fill a cataplana dish halfway with Herb Butter.
Arrange dumplings evenly on top of the butter.
Pour the vegetable stock cube mixture over the dumplings and allow it to soak for 5 minutes or until all dumplings are saturated.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired before baking for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
